
<style>
.msg { padding:10px; margin:10px 0; border-radius:8px; }
.msg.human { background: #2a2a2a; border: 1px solid #555; }
.msg.ai    { background: #262b36; border: 1px solid #445; }
.msg.tool  { background: #2e3330; border: 1px solid #474; }
summary { cursor:pointer; }
</style>
<details class="msg human">
<summary><strong>Human</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[HUMAN\] Pick the plate

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
\[REASONING\_NOTE\] From the symbolic perception and visual perception, I can identify the plate tagged as "Plate\_57" located at position \(x=0.62, y=0.6, z=1.08\). Given that I am currently at position \(x=\-2.51, y=1.7, z=\-0.99\), I will use the PickObject tool to pick up the plate. The tool will automatically handle the movement to get within reach of the object.

**Tool calls**
- **Tool call:** `PickObject`

```json
{
  "ObjTag": "Plate_57"
}
```


<details>

</details>

</details>

<details class="msg tool">
<summary><strong>Tool Response: PickObject</strong></summary>

**Content**
Object Plate\_57 was not initially reachable; you moved to \(x=0.16, y=0.08, z=1.11\) and picked it successfully.

</details>

<details class="msg ai">
<summary><strong>AI</strong></summary>

**Content**
I have successfully picked up the plate as requested. The system first moved me to a position where I could reach the plate, and then I was able to pick it up.
